mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0) AS userTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE del_flag = 0 AND status = 1) AS enabledUserTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE del_flag = 0) AS deptTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_role WHERE del_flag = 0) AS roleTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = 0) AS menuTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_permission WHERE del_flag = 0 AND status = 1) AS permissionTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = 0) AS fileTotal, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = 0) AS fileTotalSize, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_login_log WHERE DATE(login_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayLoginTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_oper_log WHERE DATE(oper_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayOperTotal

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_login_log WHERE login_time BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_oper_log WHERE oper_time BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = 0 AND create_time BETWEEN #{startDateTime} AND #{endDateTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ASC
SELECT CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN '成功' ELSE '失败' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_login_log WHERE login_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY status ORDER BY status ASC
SELECT storage_type AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sys_file WHERE del_flag = 0 GROUP BY storage_type ORDER BY value DESC, storage_type ASC

SELECT d.dept_name AS name, COUNT(u.id) AS value FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.dept_id = d.id AND u.del_flag = 0 WHERE d.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name ORDER BY value DESC, d.id ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT r.role_name AS name, COUNT(ur.user_id) AS value FROM sys_role r LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE r.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY r.id, r.role_name ORDER BY value DESC, r.id ASC LIMIT 10
